records.ety: [It. bandito outlaw, p. p. of bandire to proclaim, to banish, to proscribe, LL. bandire, bannire. See Ban an edict, and cf. Banish.]

quotes: No savage fierce, bandit, or mountaineer.
Deerstealers are ever a desperate banditti.
notes: ☞ The plural banditti was formerly used as a collective noun.
